exceptions.reason: Only the circle variant is missing the role. The block, line and (single- or multi-line) text variants all render role="status" aria-label="Loading", but the circle variant renders aria-hidden="true" with no role at all -- a screen reader is told nothing is loading while the circle placeholder is on screen.

Same variant, same cause: role="status" carries an implicit aria-live="polite", but the circle variant has no role at all -- aria-hidden="true" and nothing else -- so it has no implicit live region either. There is nothing to announce a change politely or otherwise while the circle placeholder is on screen.
